episode_title: KT #755 - DR PHIL (ADAM RAY) + SAL VULCANO, + GREG FITZSIMMONS

1.premise: Refusing one-night stands in favor of two night stands is really about bedroom furniture symmetry.
Mishearing 'VYI' as 'DUI' shifts the concern from sex to drunk driving.

lines.text: So, I don't do one night stands anymore.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I do two night stands.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Otherwise it looks, you know, it makes the bedroom look uneven.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Yeah, last time I hooked up with the girls on Sixth Street and, you know, she takes me
lines.label: setup

lines.text: home.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm super drunk.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She's super high, you know.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: We start macking as soon as we walk through the door.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I go down on her, I don't know why, in the moment I go down on her.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm horny, that's why.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But yeah, she stops me, I'm like, "Oh shit, is she on her period?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: No.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like, "Is she trans?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: No.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She told me she had a DUI, or that's what I thought I heard, you know?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I'm like, "Why'd you tell me this now?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You drove us here and then you're gonna tell me that?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It's fucking crazy.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But she tells me, no, no, no, a VYI.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm like, VY, what the fuck's a VYI?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She has vaginal yeast infection.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: (mumbling)
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I was like, yeah, I'll take the mag,

lines.text: you can keep the cheese.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Thank you, mine's the first time for you.
